turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hi there . just got home from school . i ride my skateboard . how are you ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i'm good , did you ride skateboard to school ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: oh yes . i get weird looks though because i am a girl .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: girl power ! that is so cool , do you wear zebras socks ?

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: no , i wear low cut socks .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i love zebras , you must look cute on those socks

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: uh thanks , i'm sure i do too lol . do you have any hobbies

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i write , but i want to be an actress

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: is your hair color blonde ? tv loves blondes .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: a famous one , milk makes me sick , are you allergic to it , i am .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: nah . but i do not drink it , i stick to almond milk .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i know , i will have to dye my hair , they want me to walk in the beach .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: make sure you keep your roots covered ! the beach is so pretty .
